use_cases: Hero section animated headline with responsive wave lines that react to cursor proximity
Interactive text visualization for creative portfolio or media landing pages
Engaging typography effect for tech product marketing materials
Dynamic decorative element for digital art or design tool interfaces
Interactive name plate or signature component for creator platforms
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based text effect component that renders wavy horizontal lines responding to mouse movement. The component creates a wave deformation effect around text with 60 animated lines and configurable padding. Features CSS variable theming support with fallback colors, requestAnimationFrame-based smooth animations, and mouse tracking for interactive line displacement. Perfect for creative tool interfaces, media sites, and saas landing pages requiring engaging typography effects.
